# Recurring Events: Set It Once, Forget It

## What This Does 
Lets families create events that repeat automatically - no more typing "soccer practice" every week!

## Why Families Need This
**The Problem:** Right now, if your child has soccer practice every Tuesday, you have to create a new event every single week. That's 52 events per year for just one activity!

**The Solution:** Just say "Schedule soccer practice every Tuesday at 4pm" and it creates all the events automatically.

## How Families Will Use It

### Simple Examples
- "Schedule dinner with grandma every Sunday at 6pm"
- "Add piano lessons every Wednesday at 3pm for the next 3 months"
- "Set up our family movie night every Friday at 7pm"

### Advanced Examples  
- "Schedule parent-teacher conferences every other month"
- "Add swimming lessons every Tuesday and Thursday at 5pm"
- "Set up date night every first Saturday of the month"

## What Success Looks Like
✅ **Easy to Say:** Families can use natural language like "every Tuesday"
✅ **Smart Understanding:** AI knows the difference between "every week" and "every other week"
✅ **Flexible Ending:** Can say "for 3 months" or "until June"
✅ **Easy Changes:** Can modify or cancel recurring events
✅ **Clear Display:** Calendar shows which events repeat

## Real Family Benefits
- **Saves Time:** Set up a whole season of activities in one sentence
- **Less Forgetting:** Never forget to schedule regular events
- **Better Planning:** See your family's routine at a glance
- **Easier Changes:** Update all future events at once

## Common Questions
**Q: What if I need to skip one week?**
A: You can cancel or change individual events while keeping the rest

**Q: Can I see all future events?**
A: Yes, the calendar shows all upcoming events in the series

**Q: What if I want to change the time for all future events?**
A: You can update all remaining events at once
